title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!
